key.name: device-id
key.description: Random id generated on first run and sent to UMS as DeviceId.

key.name: active-school
key.summary: Id of the currently connected school

key.name: username
key.summary: Username of the saved account (secret lives in the keyring)

key.name: login-method
key.summary: Id of the login method used for the saved account

key.name: custom-name
key.summary: Display name of a hand-entered (Custom) school

key.name: custom-base-url
key.summary: Base URL of a hand-entered (Custom) school

key.name: custom-family
key.summary: Provider family of a hand-entered (Custom) school

key.name: language
key.description: Language code (e.g. 'da') forcing the app's interface language regardless of the system locale, via the LANGUAGE env var. '' follows the system. Applied at startup (see Localization.apply); a change takes full effect on restart.

key.name: color-scheme
key.description: 0 = follow system, 1 = light, 2 = dark. Applied via AdwStyleManager.

key.name: accent-color
key.description: 0 = follow system; 1–9 = AdwAccentColor (blue, teal, green, yellow, orange, red, pink, purple, slate). Overridden via a CSS provider since AdwStyleManager's accent is read-only.

key.name: first-weekday
key.summary: Day the calendar week starts on
key.description: 0 = use the school's default; 1–7 = ISO weekday (1 Monday … 7 Sunday).

key.name: background-sync
key.summary: Keep running in the background to refresh cached data
key.description: On desktop, closing the window hides the app instead of quitting it, and the cache is refreshed periodically (see sync-interval-minutes) so everything keeps working offline. Quit still exits for real.

key.name: sync-interval-minutes
key.description: Used while a session is active and background sync is enabled.

key.name: active-school-name
key.summary: Display name of the active school
key.description: Saved at login for schools that only exist in a live directory (LUDUS), so a relaunch can rebuild the school without the network.

key.name: notify-new-grades
key.description: Detected by the background refresh against the grades already seen; off by default.

key.name: notify-new-exams
key.summary: Notify when new exams are scheduled
key.description: An exam is an upcoming lesson the school marks as non-skippable; off by default.

key.name: token-valid-until
key.summary: Unix time (seconds) the saved session token is valid until
key.description: From the JWT 'exp' claim. 0 means unknown (no expiry claim); the token is still tried.
